title: 15 seconds of what ever you want collaboration
description:
Pretty self-explanatory what participants had to do.

Collaboration was originally led by NESFanboi but after much inactivity I took over this collaboration to finish it. And now here it is.

Entrances:

1. Me
2. Davaia (aka. Squadala the Dewott)
3. Durchfallfabrik
4. MaZZ0Murder
5. MrAepox
6. ShinyComics
7. ZorotheGallade

There were more participants who completed their entries, but these got lost, because they made them around the time of the beginning of 2010 (were also this collaboration came up)

Thank you for paricipating!
